title: MikroTik K-79 - Rackmount ears set for RB5009 series (for mounting up to four RB5009 in rack)
description: With this kit, it is possible to mount 1, 2, 3 or up to 4 MikroTik devices in a single 1U with a size of 19". It is above all a perfect use of space which is not never enough in the rack The K-79 gull ears are compatible only with these MikroTik devices : RB5009UG+S+IN RB5009UPr+S+IN L009UiGS-RM
